_comment: Sample MCP server configurations. Copy servers you want to ~/.claude/mcp.json (user-wide) or .mcp.json in your project (team-shared).
_note: Shipkit has NO default MCPs - you choose what to install. The /install skill guides you through popular options.

brave-search._comment: Powers /research skill. Free API key: https://brave.com/search/api/

github._comment: Enhances /pr and /review skills. Uses your existing GITHUB_TOKEN.

filesystem._comment: Enhanced file operations. No API key needed.

sqlite._comment: Local database queries. Replace path with your db.

_usage: Copy the servers you want to ~/.claude/mcp.json. Set required env vars in ~/.claude/settings.json under 'env' key. More info: docs/mcp-servers.md
